title: Gluten-Free Turkish Toast
description: A simple and crunchy Turkish-inspired toast recipe made with gluten-free bread, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Toast the gluten-free bread until lightly browned.
Melt the butter and spread on the toasted bread.
Crack the egg and fry in a pan until the whites are set and the yolks are cooked to your desired doneness.
Slice the cucumber and tomato into thin pieces.
Chop the crunchy lettuce into smaller pieces.
Assemble the toast by placing the fried egg on top of the melted butter, followed by the sliced cucumber and tomato, and finally the chopped lettuce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
